explanation: I entered the seeded Pretix administrator email after landing on the protected product route.
I entered the seeded Pretix administrator password.
I signed in so Pretix can return to the seeded product detail page.
I switched to the Availability tab so the purchase-limit controls become visible.
I set the seeded product purchase limit but left the final Save action pending.

action.question: I have prepared the seeded product purchase limit change to 4. Do you want me to save it?

explanation: Saving would persist a purchase-limit change to the seeded Pretix product, so I am asking for confirmation before submitting it.
